name: runtime_txn
description: One row per dispatched transaction (committable or not), with the execution results

bank_seq.description: Monotonic sequence number identifying this block within the current run; the join key to block_completed. Restarts at 1 each time a snapshot is loaded, so pair it with the stream's boot id. 0 means unavailable.

slot.description: Bank slot in which this transaction was executed

epoch.description: Epoch the transaction was executed in

signature.description: First signature of the transaction (64 bytes)

is_simple_vote.description: True if the transaction was classified as a simple vote, false otherwise

is_bundle.description: True if the transaction is part of a Jito bundle, false otherwise

is_committable.description: True if the transaction was committable (landed on-chain)

is_fees_only.description: True if the transaction landed but only fees were charged (e.g. account loading failure)

txn_err.description: Transaction execution error (success when transaction succeeded)

would_exceed_max_block_cost_limit.description: would exceed max block cost limit

would_exceed_max_account_cost_limit.description: would exceed max account cost limit

would_exceed_account_data_block_limit.description: would exceed account data block limit

would_exceed_max_vote_cost_limit.description: would exceed max vote cost limit

would_exceed_account_data_total_limit.description: would exceed account data total limit

max_loaded_accounts_data_size_exceeded.description: max loaded accounts data size exceeded

invalid_loaded_accounts_data_size_limit.description: invalid loaded accounts data size limit

exec_err.description: Instruction execution error; only meaningful when txn_err = instruction_error

generic_err.description: The program instruction returned an error

invalid_arg.description: The arguments provided to a program were invalid

invalid_instr_data.description: An instruction's data contents were invalid

invalid_acc_data.description: An account's data contents was invalid

acc_data_too_small.description: An account's data was too small

insufficient_funds.description: An account's balance was too small to complete the instruction

incorrect_program_id.description: The account did not have the expected program id

missing_required_signature.description: A signature was required but not found

acc_already_initialized.description: An initialize instruction was sent to an account that has already been initialized.

uninitialized_account.description: An attempt to operate on an account that hasn't been initialized.

unbalanced_instr.description: Program's instruction lamport balance does not equal the balance after the instruction

modified_program_id.description: Program illegally modified an account's program id

external_account_lamport_spend.description: Program spent the lamports of an account that doesn't belong to it

external_data_modified.description: Program modified the data of an account that doesn't belong to it

duplicate_account_idx.description: An account was referenced more than once in a single instruction. Deprecated.

executable_modified.description: Executable bit on account changed, but shouldn't have

rent_epoch_modified.description: Rent_epoch account changed, but shouldn't have

not_enough_acc_keys.description: The instruction expected additional account keys

acc_data_size_changed.description: Program other than the account's owner changed the size of the account data

acc_not_executable.description: The instruction expected an executable account

acc_borrow_failed.description: Failed to borrow a reference to account data, already borrowed

acc_borrow_outstanding.description: Account data has an outstanding reference after a program's execution

duplicate_account_out_of_sync.description: The same account was multiply passed to an on-chain program's entrypoint, but the program modified them differently.

custom_err.description: Allows on-chain programs to implement program-specific error types and see them returned by the runtime.

invalid_err.description: The return value from the program was invalid.

executable_account_not_rent_exempt.description: Executable accounts must be rent exempt

call_depth.description: Cross-program invocation call depth too deep

missing_acc.description: An account required by the instruction is missing

reentrancy_not_allowed.description: Cross-program invocation reentrancy not allowed for this instruction

max_seed_length_exceeded.description: Length of the seed is too long for address generation

invalid_seeds.description: Provided seeds do not result in a valid address

invalid_realloc.description: Failed to reallocate account data of this length

privilege_escalation.description: Cross-program invocation with unauthorized signer or writable account

program_environment_setup_failure.description: Failed to create program execution environment

borsh_io_error.description: Failed to serialize or deserialize account data

acc_not_rent_exempt.description: An account does not have enough lamports to be rent-exempt

max_accs_data_allocs_exceeded.description: Account data allocation exceeded the maximum accounts data size limit

builtins_must_consume_cus.description: Builtin programs must consume compute units

exec_err_kind.description: Source kind of exec_err; only meaningful when txn_err = instruction_error

exec_err_idx.description: Instruction index that failed (INT_MAX if not applicable)

custom_err.description: Custom error code returned by the program (only meaningful for CUSTOM_ERROR)

compute_unit_limit.description: Compute unit limit requested by the transaction

compute_unit_price.description: Compute unit price (micro-lamports per CU) requested by the transaction

compute_units_consumed.description: compute_unit_limit minus the remaining compute meter at commit

heap_size.description: Requested heap size for the VM

num_builtin_instrs.description: Number of builtin program instructions in the transaction

loaded_accounts_data_size.description: Total bytes of account data loaded for this transaction

loaded_accounts_data_size_limit.description: Configured loaded-accounts-data-size limit for this transaction

accounts_resize_delta.description: Absolute magnitude of net delta in writable account data sizes during execution; check accounts_resize_is_negative for sign

accounts_resize_is_negative.description: True when the net delta is negative (writable account data net shrunk during execution)

execution_fee.description: Execution fee paid by the fee payer

priority_fee.description: Priority fee paid by the fee payer

signature_count.description: Number of signatures in the transaction

cost_allocated_accounts_data_size.description: Allocated accounts data size from the cost tracker

account_diffs.description: Per-account diffs for writable accounts that were modified

is_executable.description: True if the post-state account is executable

is_stake_update.description: True if this write touched the stake cache

is_vote_update.description: True if this write touched the vote cache

is_new_vote.description: True if this write created a new vote account

is_rm_vote.description: True if this write removed a vote account

writable_accounts.description: Every account the transaction locked as writable

readonly_accounts.description: Every account the transaction locked as readonly, in account-order

program_ids.description: Distinct program pubkeys invoked at the top level of this transaction
